SELECT hour(event_time) + 1 AS adjusted_hour FROM timestamps WHERE hour(event_time) < 23;
WITH hourly_data AS (SELECT hour(event_time) AS hour_of_day FROM timestamps) SELECT hour_of_day, COUNT(*) FROM hourly_data GROUP BY hour_of_day;

SELECT t1.event_time, t2.event_time, hour(t1.event_time) AS t1_hour, hour(t2.event_time) AS t2_hour FROM (SELECT TIMESTAMP '2021-08-03 11:00:00' AS event_time) t1 JOIN (SELECT TIMESTAMP '2021-08-03 23:30:00' AS event_time) t2 ON hour(t1.event_time) = hour(t2.event_time);
CREATE TABLE event_logs (log_time TIMESTAMP, log_message VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO event_logs VALUES (TIMESTAMP '2021-08-03 08:15:25', 'Event A'), (TIMESTAMP '2021-08-03 08:45:00', 'Event B'), (TIMESTAMP '2021-08-03 09:00:10', 'Event C');
SELECT log_message, hour(log_time) AS log_hour FROM event_logs WHERE hour(log_time) = 8;
SELECT AVG(hour(event_time)) AS average_hour FROM (SELECT event_time FROM timestamps) AS subquery;
